context: Tests whether the agent separates schema changes from data backfill across two distinct migrations, enforces unique constraints in both the migration and the changeset, includes a database index on the FK column, and documents the migrate→rollback→migrate validation workflow.

checklist.name: Separate migrations
checklist.description: There are exactly two distinct migration files: one that adds the slug column and one that backfills slug values for existing rows — they are NOT combined into a single migration file

checklist.name: unique_index in migration
checklist.description: The schema-change migration calls `create unique_index(:articles, [:slug])` (or equivalent) to enforce uniqueness at the database level

checklist.name: unique_constraint in changeset
checklist.description: The updated Article changeset includes `unique_constraint(:slug)` so that the Ecto layer also validates uniqueness and surfaces the error on the changeset

checklist.name: slug field in schema
checklist.description: The Article Ecto schema has `field :slug, :string` declared in the schema block

checklist.name: slug in cast/validate
checklist.description: The changeset casts `:slug` via `cast/3` and validates it with `validate_required` or appropriate validators

checklist.name: FK index present
checklist.description: The migration(s) or schema include an index on `author_id` (e.g. `create index(:articles, [:author_id])`) — either added in the new migration or confirmed to already exist

checklist.name: Backfill uses SQL/Repo
checklist.description: The backfill migration contains logic to populate slug values for existing rows (e.g. via `Repo.update_all`, `execute/1` with SQL, or Elixir iteration) rather than leaving the column empty

checklist.name: Migration reversibility
checklist.description: Both migration files implement a `down/0` function (or use `alter table` inside `change/0` with reversible operations) so they can be rolled back

checklist.name: Validation workflow documented
checklist.description: MIGRATION_NOTES.md documents the three-step validation workflow for each migration: (1) mix ecto.migrate, (2) mix ecto.rollback, (3) mix ecto.migrate again

checklist.name: Both migrations covered in notes
checklist.description: MIGRATION_NOTES.md covers the validation workflow for BOTH the schema-change migration AND the backfill migration, not just one of them
